name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union operates a global money transfer network with 500,000+ agent locations including grocery stores and retailers, enabling customers to send money, receive cash, and pay bills online or in-store.
description_long:
Western Union is a long-established money transfer company operating through a vast agent network across the United States and internationally. The company facilitates international and domestic money transfers, allowing customers to send funds online and have recipients pick up cash at physical locations. Their service model relies on partnerships with major retailers like Walmart, City Market, Safeway, Kroger, and Circle K, making their services accessible through existing store networks rather than dedicated branches.

Western Union offers multiple services including online money transfer initiation (available 24/7 on their website), in-store cash pickup based on agent hours, money tracking, bill payment, mobile top-up, money order services, and Western Union Rewards loyalty program. Customers can also receive money directly on a prepaid card. The company provides multilingual support in English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese, reflecting their focus on immigrant and international communities.

What distinguishes Western Union is their ubiquitous physical presence through retail partnerships and their 24/7 online initiation capability combined with next-day or same-day in-store pickup. Their agent-based model provides geographic accessibility without requiring customers to visit dedicated locations. The company also offers integration with various payment methods and a mobile app for convenience.

However, Western Union's fees for money transfers are typically higher than digital-only competitors, and the company has faced regulatory scrutiny regarding money laundering concerns historically. Their service depends entirely on agent location hours for cash pickup, meaning immediate 24/7 access is unavailable despite online availability. Limited transparency about specific fees is provided on their location-finder page, requiring customers to contact agents directly or visit their main site.
address: 3333 Virginia Beach Blvd Ste 101, Virginia Beach, VA 23452

company_info.headquarters: 3333 Virginia Beach Blvd Ste 101, Virginia Beach, VA 23452

pros: Massive agent network with 500,000+ locations including major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K)
24/7 online money transfer initiation through website and mobile app
Multilingual support in 6+ languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Money tracking functionality to monitor transfer status in real-time
Western Union Rewards loyalty program for repeat customers
Multiple service options including bill payment, mobile top-up, and money orders
Ability to receive money directly on prepaid Western Union cards
cons: Higher fees compared to digital-only money transfer competitors and fintech services
Cash pickup limited to agent location hours despite 24/7 online availability
No immediate cash access for urgent needs—all pickups depend on retail store operating hours
Historical regulatory concerns and compliance issues with money laundering prevention
Fee transparency limited on location-finder page; customers must contact agents or visit main site for pricing
best_for: International money senders with recipients in countries with Western Union agent networks
Unbanked and underbanked customers without traditional bank accounts seeking cash access
Immigrant communities and international families sending money to relatives abroad
Customers prioritizing retail location convenience over lower digital-only fees
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers who need to send money internationally or access cash through retail locations and prioritize geographic convenience over competitive pricing. The primary caveat is that fees are substantially higher than digital alternatives like Wise or PayPal, and actual cash access depends entirely on agent store hours despite online transfers being available 24/7.
services: Online money transfer initiation (24/7 web and mobile)
In-store cash pickup at agent locations
Money receipt on prepaid Western Union cards
